self-improving-skills.note: Local skill-manager MCP for Codex self-improvement. Provides safe skill list/view/create/patch/write/archive/curate/backup/rollback/scan tools with usage telemetry and a read-before-write guard. Startup depends on the plugin-root cwd contract (cwd: '.'); if PLUGIN_ROOT is absent the server falls back to resolving paths from its own file location — do not replace args with env-var substitutions (not a verified Codex contract).
